emotional_tone: Technical, precise, utilitarian, raw but polished

rules: Use Outfit for headers, navigation, and primary CTAs.
Use JetBrains Mono for chat messages, webhook URLs, timestamps, and metadata.
Overlines/Labels must use uppercase, tiny size (text-xs), wide spacing (tracking-[0.2em]).
Never use pure black or pure white. Always tint greys.
Primary accent (Volt Yellow) is strictly for active states, primary CTA, and left-borders of AI responses.

layout.sidebar: w-72 border-r border-border/40 bg-surface flex flex-col hidden md:flex
layout.header: h-16 border-b border-border/40 flex items-center px-6 justify-between shrink-0 bg-surface/50 backdrop-blur-md
layout.input_area: p-4 sm:p-6 border-t border-border/40 bg-background/80 backdrop-blur-md

components.webhook_input: Use pure functional styling. JetBrains Mono font. Border color changes to primary_accent on focus. Must include data-testid='webhook-url-input'.
components.chat_bubble_user: Flat, rectangular, bg-surface, border border-border/40, text-right self-end max-w-[85%] sm:max-w-[70%] p-4. No rounded corners. JetBrains Mono.
components.chat_bubble_ai: Flat, rectangular, bg-transparent, border-l-2 border-primary_accent pl-4 py-2 text-left self-start w-full max-w-4xl. No rounded corners. JetBrains Mono.
components.buttons: Sharp edges (rounded-none). Primary: bg-primary_accent text-black hover:bg-primary_accent_hover. Secondary: border border-border/40 text-text_primary hover:bg-surface.
components.loading_indicator: Terminal style blinking cursor or ASCII animation (e.g., '> Awaiting n8n response...') instead of generic spinners.
components.sidebar_item: Hover state: bg-background border-l-2 border-primary_accent text-primary_accent. Default: text-text_secondary border-l-2 border-transparent.

surfaces.strategy: Grid Borders (The 'Technical' Look). Expose the skeleton. Container uses border-collapse layout.
surfaces.card: Flat background, 1px subtle border, no shadow. Sharp corners (rounded-none).

motion.hover: Instant or very fast (0.1s) transitions. Keep it snappy and technical.
motion.chat_entrance: Slide up slightly and fade in using framer-motion.

rules: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid.
Ensure the chat container has data-testid='chat-messages-container'.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use Tailwind CSS purely. Install required Google Fonts (Outfit, JetBrains Mono) via standard imports in index.css.
Implement Shadcn components but aggressively customize them: strip away all rounded corners (use `rounded-none` globally) to match the Brutalist/Technical vibe.
The application is for testing n8n webhooks. The header should have a settings panel or input for the Webhook URL and a connection status indicator (reachable/unreachable).
Chat messages must be mapped to JetBrains Mono font to look like log outputs.
For AI messages, don't use typical chat bubbles. Use full-width log-style rows with a left accent border (Volt Yellow).
Build a sidebar for chat session history. Provide a 'New Chat' button.
Do not use generic Inter font. Do not use teal or purple.
App uses React with `.js` files, NO `.tsx` files. Configure Shadcn to output JavaScript if necessary, or just use vanilla components.
Ensure data-testid attributes are comprehensively added to all inputs, buttons, and message rows for automated testing.
